_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforcement mechanisms, exception handling processes, and policy lifecycle management.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.521), RC-K-008 (RC, cosine: 0.517).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.438). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [organizational, policies, security] vs WIDAI-only terms [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.905 (P=0.943, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.073 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.9%). "Knowledge of organizational security policies." and "Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.577 > STS 0.438 (gap +0.139). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [organizational, policies, security]. WIDAI-only: [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle].

signals.detail: STS 0.438 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.139 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
